scripts.dev: npx concurrently -n user,captain,ride,gateway -c green,blue,magenta,yellow "npm run dev --prefix user" "npm run dev --prefix Captain" "npm run dev --prefix ride" "npm run dev --prefix gateway"
scripts.start: npx concurrently -n user,captain,ride,gateway -c green,blue,magenta,yellow "npm run start --prefix user" "npm run start --prefix Captain" "npm run start --prefix ride" "npm run start --prefix gateway"
